name: wallet
description: Unified ledger for non-cash entitlements: cash-balance mirror + prepaid store credit + loyalty points. One table serves all three via a kind discriminator (per DL-2 in tasks.md). Model A (non-custodial mirror) — Academorix never holds customer funds; the wallet is a materialized view over gateway balances + tenant-issued entitlements. Rejected Model B (custodial) because triggers money-transmitter licensing (state-by-state US, EMI in EU, DFSA in UAE). Owns three tables: wallets (one per owner+kind+currency), wallet_transactions (immutable debit/credit log, composed reference to source), wallet_holds (reserved balance during in-progress checkouts, settled/released on order state transition). Cross-integrates with finance/order (holds on checkout, transactions on paid), finance/refund (credit-refund alternative), finance/gateway (cash-mirror nightly reconciliation via Stripe Connect balance API).

wraps.rationale: Data DTOs for wire contracts. No custodial vendor — the module is a mirror ledger, not a wallet product.

tenant.description: Tenant-facing wallet ledger. Guardians see own wallets (all kinds); staff+finance see tenant wallets.
